name: Cheese Bread Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cheese bread into half-inch thick pieces and cut each piece in half crosswise.
2. Spread 1 tablespoon of Kitchen Kettle chili sauce on each bread piece and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of grated sharp Cheddar cheese.
3. Bake on a cookie sheet for 5 to 7 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit or until the cheese melts.
